            {("Header", "'d Assetinstrument'[Valuation Group]")},

        )
    VAR __DS0FilterTable20 =

        TREATAS({"'d Sector'[Sector]"}, 'sf Filter 2'[sf Filter 2 Fields])
    VAR __DS0Core =

        __DS0FilterTable2,

        __DS0FilterTable13,

        __DS0FilterTable16,
        __DS0FilterTable17,
        __DS0FilterTable18,
        __DS0FilterTable19,
        __DS0FilterTable20,
        __DS0FilterTable21,
        __DS0FilterTable22,
        __DS0FilterTable23,
        "WF1_Base", 'm Measure'[WF1-Base],
        "WF5_Return_Base", 'm Measure'[WF5-Return Base],
        "WF2_Blank", 'm Measure'[WF2-Blank],
        "WF3_Negative", 'm Measure'[WF3-Negative],
        "WF4_Positive", 'm Measure'[WF4-Positive],
        "Waterfall_Title", 'm Measure'[Waterfall Title],
        "WF6_Minimum", 'm Measure'[WF6-Minimum],
        "WF3_Negative___Label", 'm Measure'[WF3-Negative - Label],
        "WF4_Positive___Label", 'm Measure'[WF4-Positive - Label],
        "v__WF1_Base_FormatString", IGNORE('m Measure'[_WF1-Base FormatString]),
        "v__WF4_Positive_FormatString", IGNORE('m Measure'[_WF4-Positive FormatString]),
        "v__WF3_Negative_FormatString", IGNORE('m Measure'[_WF3-Negative FormatString]),
        "v__WF5_Return_Base_FormatString", IGNORE('m Measure'[_WF5-Return Base FormatString]),
        "v__WF2_Blank_FormatString", IGNORE('m Measure'[_WF2-Blank FormatString]),
        "v__WF6_Minimum_FormatString", IGNORE('m Measure'[_WF6-Minimum FormatString]),
        "v__WF4_Positive___Label_FormatString", IGNORE('m Measure'[_WF4-Positive - Label FormatString]),
        "v__WF3_Negative___Label_FormatString", IGNORE('m Measure'[_WF3-Negative - Label FormatString])
        )
    VAR __DS0PrimaryWindowed =
        TOPN(1001, __DS0Core, 's Waterfall Bucket'[Bucket], 1)

ORDER BY 's Waterfall Bucket'[Bucket]
